name: Strange world
description:
You have all the power and want... but the world doesnt change, only you did...

You can do anything you want but the world is just as it is now. You can influence person by person but not everything or everyone at once.


(if its a little confusing dont worry, just know that 1. you cant change the whole world, but you’re basically supreme in a 100ft/30m radius of yourself,. 2. you can influence only 1 person st a time in this radius.
creator: Lazyraie
